subject: Here is where American voters stand on immigration
body:
Last week, President Donald J. Trump made an appeal for bipartisanship to solve America’s immigration crisis. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b15fe4a60&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 30, 2019
---
| | |
# **Here is where American voters stand on immigration**

**Last week,** President Donald J. Trump made an appeal for bipartisanship to solve America’s immigration crisis. The reason is simple: Ordinary Americans across the political spectrum want to see illegal immigration addressed. The people fighting hardest to preserve the horrible status quo are entrenched interests in Washington.

**This time must be different.** President Trump has given Congress 3 weeks to reach a deal that secures our border while protecting the most vulnerable communities. Public opinion polls back the President up:
* **A recent[ABC/_Washington Post_ poll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05f74bcb88&e=3ee4985eea)** shows that most Americans believe the Government is doing “too little” to stop illegal immigration—including 4 in 5 Republicans, more than a third of Democrats, and a majority of independents.

* **Echoing that theme,** a [Gallup poll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57bf86fdfa&e=3ee4985eea) last month revealed that Americans view immigration as the second-biggest problem facing the country today.

* **A 2018[POLITICO/Morning Consult poll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=214ec0edc2&e=3ee4985eea) **confirms a majority of voters disagree with Democrats’ proposal to eliminate U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement entirely. Not even a majority of Democratic voters agree.

* **Gallup polls from 2018** show that a majority of Americans personally worry about illegal immigration a “great deal” or a “fair amount.” More Americans oppose than support “sanctuary cities” that skirt Federal immigration laws, as well.

**If Americans of all stripes** call for safe and secure borders as part of common-sense immigration reform, why not give law enforcement the tools they need to do their jobs safely and effectively? That shouldn’t be controversial. Congress needs to put the concerns of American voters before those of special and political interests.

**There is some good news,** however: A growing number of Democrats understand that obstructing immigration reform would put them at odds with ordinary Americans. In recent weeks, they’ve broken rank with Democratic leaders such as House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) and have backed border security.

**“Certainly you need barriers** , and we support barriers,” Sen. Ben Cardin (D-MD) explains. Ditto Sen. Mark Warner (D-VA): “Where folks say we need additional barrier protections, I’m all for it.”

**Democrats who put sensible solutions** above obstructionist politics should be applauded. Those who don’t need to listen to voters—not their donors or party bosses.

[Something to share: Border security will put human traffickers out of business.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7aa4a38731&e=3ee4985eea)

**Former DHS special agent:** [“We Need to Build the Wall for the Children”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1de490a05&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump calls Venezuela’s interim President**

**President Trump last week** officially recognized Juan Guaido, President of the Venezuelan National Assembly, as the country’s Interim President.

**More than 3 million people** have fled Venezuela since 2015. The United Nations estimates that number may swell to more than 5.3 million by the end of 2019. The United States is standing with Venezuelans as they demand democracy, human rights, and prosperity—all things denied to them by the corrupt Maduro regime and its authoritarian predecessor, Hugo Chavez.

**President Trump spoke with** Interim President Guaido today, congratulating him on his historic assumption of the presidency and reaffirming American support for Venezuela’s fight to regain its democracy.

[“The fight for freedom has begun!,” President Trump tweets.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f19295ad3&e=3ee4985eea)

**Vice President Pence:**[“Venezuela, America Stands With You”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4972bb56c&e=3ee4985eea)
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Are We Headed for Another Shutdown?
body:
Are We Headed for Another Shutdown? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-y/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-j/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [Are We Headed for Another Shutdown?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-i/)
Well the longest government shutdown in U.S. history is finally over. Of course we could be right back in the middle of another one in less than three weeks. So what's going to happen? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [What the heck is a "Green New Deal"?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well, the partial government shutdown drags on. Today is day 33 - the longest shutdown in U.S. history. We've seen Speaker Pelosi uninvite President Trump to the State of the Union. We've seen President Trump counterpunch, and cancel Pelosi's plane ride to the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Hold on to Your Wallet](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-p/)
There are a whole bunch of Democrats who would like to be "the chosen one" to run against President Trump in the next election. Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts, Tulsi Gabbard of Hawaii, and Julian Castro of Texas are a few who have already thrown their hats into the ring. I would expect a slew of others to jump in in the upcoming weeks and months. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-x/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [Is "A Wall an Immorality"?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-q/)
Last week, Nancy Pelosi, who is once again the most powerful Member of the U.S. House of Representatives, claimed that "a wall is an immorality." Is she right? In my opinion, absolutely not. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-f/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [My Predictions for 2019](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-v/)
Well, it's that time of year again. Time for me to go out on a limb, and predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year. Here goes. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-e/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-w/)
First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-yd/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-yh/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-yk/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-yu/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-jl/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtdlhrut-kujkulhluu-jr/)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Bumping this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
Peter, I wanted to update you right away: Tonight is our first major fundraising deadline, and I just got word that we're about to miss our goal by $18,200. Tomorrow I'm headed to New Hampshire for my first campaign visit in the early primary state, and we need to go into it knowing we have the resources to win.
I want this to be a community-led effort to fight for what's right. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC. **That means I 'm counting on you to join my team to help hit our first goal. Here's the link to donate - whatever amount you can makes a difference: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976919/2ae112ef/1785f993/357a219d/3685069201/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTktZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Hitting this goal will be a huge win. I can't thank you enough.
Kirsten
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Stefanie Conahan, kirstengillibrand.com
Date: Wed, Jan 30, 2019
Subject: We depend on you, Peter
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976919/2ae112ef/1785f993/357a219c/3685069201/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976919/2ae112ef/1785f993/357a219c/3685069201/VEsF/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Hey Peter, I'm Stefanie, Kirsten's national finance director. It's my job to make sure we have the resources we need to power this campaign, and right now we're coming up on our first critical fundraising goal.
Before I ask you to invest in this campaign, I want to tell you what we're focused on: introducing voters in key early states to Kirsten. Because when people know Kirsten, when they know her courage and compassion and see what a fighter she is, they get fired up to support her.
To build a campaign that brings Kirsten to voters across the country, we need digital ads, print materials for our volunteers and travel to key primary states - she'll be in New Hampshire this weekend and in South Carolina soon after. But that all takes significant resources - resources we don't have enough of right now.
Now's the part where I ask you to make a donation. We have a finance plan with budgets each month, and we're falling $27,000 short this month with just one day left. **Missing our first major campaign goal will be a huge blow, and since we 're not accepting any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists and won't have an individual super PAC, we depend on this team to power our campaign.**
**[Kirsten is committed to taking on Trump and fighting for you and your family. That's why she's running. But to keep building this campaign, it's critical we meet our January goal. Will you give $5 right now to make sure Kirsten can keep fighting for you?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976919/2ae112ef/1785f993/357a219d/3685069201/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTktZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976919/2ae112ef/1785f993/357a219d/3685069201/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTktZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2719-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so proud of this campaign we're building and the people who have made it possible. Thanks for all you do.
Stefanie

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Walls Work
body:
"Of all the Democrats’ arguments against a southern border wall, the shadiest is that it would not work..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abed6a45c0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Walls Work**

“Of all the Democrats’ arguments against a southern border wall, the shadiest is that it would not work,” Deroy Murdock writes in _National Review_. The evidence says otherwise: “Love them or hate them, their effectiveness is indisputable.”

Murdock gives 8 examples. Here’s just one: “A barrier between the Tucson, Ariz., sector and Nogales, Mexico, was erected in 2000. That year’s 616,346 arrests plunged to 38,657 in FY 2017 — down 93.7 percent.” That doesn’t just mean less illegal immigration. It means fewer potentially fatal encounters with smugglers and traffickers for our law enforcement officers, too.

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92bc3ccfa5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In his inauguration speech, President Trump promised: ‘We will follow two simple rules: Buy American and Hire American,’ [White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4722dcac9&e=3ee4985eea) writes in Fox News. Today, the President will sign an executive order—“Strengthening Buy American Preferences for Infrastructure Projects”—that will give another boost to these key pillars of his economic program.
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6e9aa9b50&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Eddie Scarry writes that U.S. Border Patrol agents recently apprehended both an MS-13 member and an attempted murderer near the U.S.–Mexico border. “Both incidents happened in the southernmost part of Texas, in the Rio Grande Valley sector of the border, where illegal crossings are more than three times that of any other sector and where agents told me they are in dire need of a physical barrier wall.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump spoke Wednesday with the man the U.S. government recognizes as the legitimate leader of Venezuela even as turmoil continues in the oil-rich socialist country. About 50 countries have joined the United States in recognizing opposition leader Juan Guaido as acting president of the South American nation while Venezuela’s dictator, Nicolas Maduro, tries to cling to power,” Fred Lucas writes in _[The Daily Signal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe6958c7f5&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| In an interview with _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af0ac7c94b&e=3ee4985eea)_ , President Trump harshly criticized Virginia Gov. Ralph Northam (D-VA) and Democratic state Delegate Kathy Tran’s advocacy of late-term abortion. “I thought it was terrible,” the President said, adding that “this is going to lift up the whole pro-life movement like maybe it’s never been lifted up before.”
---
|

---

name: Kamala Harris 2020
subject: I wanted to send you some topline numbers from the first 10 days of Kamala's campaign:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
As the campaign's finance director, it’s my job to keep track of our fundraising numbers and make sure we meet every single goal we set. And I mean it. Every. Single. Goal. I wanted to send you some topline numbers from the first 10 days of Kamala's campaign:
* Tens of thousands of grassroots donors -- and growing by the second
* An average online donation of just $37
* 1.3 million views of Kamala’s campaign launch video on Facebook, and more than 23,000 shares
* More than 20,000 fired-up supporters joined us in Oakland to formally kick off Kamala’s campaign on Sunday
* A brand-new poll from POLITICO shows Kamala climbing in the early rankings -- gaining seven whole points among Democrats polled
**The momentum is on our side -- but we’re going to have to work hard to keep it that way. Can you pitch in a donation to Kamala’s campaign? Look how close we are to getting there:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190131-C&t=1&akid=2562%2E5755789%2EHGezLI) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190131-C&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=2&akid=2562%2E5755789%2EHGezLI)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190131-C&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=3&akid=2562%2E5755789%2EHGezLI)
---

---

| [Another Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190131-C&t=7&akid=2562%2E5755789%2EHGezLI)
---
The numbers we’re seeing are exciting and show that momentum is in our corner -- but, at the end of the day, they’re just metrics. They don’t tell the full story of what’s happening on the ground.
Like how electrifying it felt in Oakland, with tens of thousands of fired-up supporters lining the streets for half a mile to hear Kamala officially kick off her historic campaign for president. Or what it was like to be in the room for her CNN town hall in Iowa -- or, the conversations she had with students at Drake University after the town hall, where she stayed for hours meeting with folks and listening.
**These are the feelings you can’t measure with numbers. And these are the moments your contributions make possible.**
Reaching our fundraising goals doesn’t just mean powering a strong campaign: it means Kamala can stay focused on the task at hand -- talking to voters about the issues that matter to them and their communities, not worrying about whether we’re going to hit our fundraising target.
Thanks to your support, we’re so close to hitting the first end-of-month fundraising goal of Kamala’s campaign for president.
**[Can you give $10 or more before midnight tonight and help us cross the finish line?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-1901-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190131-C&t=8&akid=2562%2E5755789%2EHGezLI)**
We’re floored by the energy, enthusiasm, and excitement that’s surrounded our campaign since Kamala decided to run. Now, it’s on us to harness it and keep the momentum going.
ac
Angelique Cannon
Finance Director
Kamala 2020

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Looking for 61

body:
Hi Peter, My husband and I reached out over the past couple of days about our 2019 founding donors drive. We're hoping to have 1,000 donors by midnight tonight to kick-start the next campaign. At last check, we are still looking for about 61 supporters to step up with a donation of any size to hit that goal, and I'm hoping you'll help push us over the top.
| | Hi Peter,

My husband and I reached out over the past couple of days about our 2019 founding donors drive. Thank you to everyone who has supported this effort! As you know, we're hoping to have 1,000 donors by midnight tonight to kick-start the next campaign. At last check, we are still looking for about 61 more supporters to step up with a donation of any size to hit that goal, and I'm hoping you'll help push us over the top.

[**You can pitch in any amount to join our list of founding donors here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sb3U627elb6gnSH0tzymC6AnxmFZJc7KB7xLJr0rcI8=/Iw7N61qF6rtXUGd-oyigt8Q93X6dQBVq-nHNUesfPpA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.31_b1_as_all&amount=25)

Our victory in 2018 was the result of an incredible grassroots effort. And as we look forward to 2020, it's important to me personally that supporters like you are a part of our foundation. We know far-right special interests will stop at nothing to get this district back in their grip, but I know that if we all work together, we'll prove once again that this district belongs to the people.

[**Please consider donating any amount today to become a 2019 founding donor.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sb3U627elb6gnSH0tzymC6AnxmFZJc7KB7xLJr0rcI8=/Iw7N61qF6rtXUGd-oyigt8Q93X6dQBVq-nHNUesfPpA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.31_b1_as_all&amount=25)

Thank you,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sb3U627elb6gnSH0tzymC6AnxmFZJc7KB7xLJr0rcI8=/Iw7N61qF6rtXUGd-oyigt8Q93X6dQBVq-nHNUesfPpA=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.31_b1_as_all&amount=25)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sb3U627elb6gnSH0tzymC6AnxmFZJc7KB7xLJr0rcI8=/H0KySMbl_gJWNBP-ZW7cGWDS2HO5H16gMX48MsqhpTw=)_
